name: Zucchini Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Bisquick or similar biscuit mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Spray a 9-inch pan or 11-by-7-inch baking dish with nonstick vegetable coating; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for about 1 hour or until lightly browned.
6. Let rest for 5 minutes before cutting into 6 servings.
